laasya_aduri.name: Laasya Aduri
laasya_aduri.summary:
Laasya Aduri has reached the Finals 2 times, proving the ability to compete at the very highest level. With 29 entries across 11 tournaments, Laasya is building a body of work that points toward big things ahead.

A true triple-threat, Laasya competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting a singles best of #2, a doubles best of #2, a mixed doubles best of #4. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Laasya has competed across U15, U17 and U19, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

With tournaments spanning Midwest, NE, South, Laasya isn't afraid to compete outside the home region — and that exposure to different playing styles only sharpens the game.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience under the belt, Laasya brings the kind of tournament-tested composure that only comes from years of stepping onto the court and competing against the best.

laasya_polineni.name: Laasya Polineni
laasya_polineni.summary:
Laasya Polineni is a U.S. Junior National Champion — a distinction that places Laasya among the finest junior players in the country. With 10 career tournament victories across 21 tournaments and 58 total entries, this is a player who consistently rises to the biggest moments.

A true triple-threat, Laasya competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 3 singles titles, 3 doubles titles, 4 mixed doubles titles. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Signature achievements: National Champion in XD U11 • National Finalist in GD U11 • 3 ORC titles (across 3 tournaments).

Laasya has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 11 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Virat Satish — 12 events together in XD, producing an outstanding 4 titles
  • Felix Liu — a trusted XD partner (6 events, best result: #2)
  • Kavya Balaji — 6 events, 1 title together in GD

Laasya has competed at both U11 and U13, showing the adaptability needed to thrive as the competition grows fiercer with each age group.

Laasya has competed across 5 different regions of the country (Midwest, NE, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

Laasya has been seeded #1 or #2 in 7 events — a recognition by tournament committees that this player is among the very best in the draw. That target on the back only makes the victories more impressive.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience and 10 titles to show for it, Laasya is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.
